songs.title: Dilaw
feed: “Dilaw” by Maki reaches #1 in the Personal Hot 100 for the first time.
“Dilaw” by Maki reaches a new peak in Personal Hot 100, rising 4 spots to #1.
“Dilaw” by Maki is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 165 streams units.
“Dilaw” by Maki is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 313,782 total units.
